text: Standing here amidst reflective glass and utilitarian exits—fire hose and extinguisher nearby—I feel a sense of anticipation, as though waiting for a gathering or the emergence of new thought in a space built for exchange. As I move into the vibrance of the R+D wall, the philosophy of innovation emblazoned before me, curiosity stirs. This place is a meeting of ideas, inviting me to consider how my actions and existence might ripple and connect with the collective quest for knowledge. I feel both the stillness of preparation and the electric charge of potential.
